title: Kalanaur FINAL Election Result 2024: Shakuntla Khatak of INC Wins by...
text:
Kalanaur FINAL Election Result 2024: Shakuntla Khatak of INC Wins by...
Detailed election result of Kalanaur constituency in the 2024 Haryana Assembly election. Shakuntla Khatak is the new Kalanaur MLA.
Shakuntla Khatak (INC) is the winner and elected as the MLA in the 2024 Kalanaur Assembly election defeating Renu Dabla (BJP) by a margin of 12,232 votes (8.54%) according to the data published by the Election Commission of India on October 8, 2024 for the 2024 Haryana Assembly election.
Kalanaur detailed election result 2024
- 1. Shakuntla Khatak (Indian National Congress), 69348 votes (48.41%)
- 2. Renu Dabla (Bharatiya Janata Party), 57116 votes (39.87%)
- 3. Prem Pradhan (Independent), 11415 votes (7.97%)
- 4. Poonam Nigana (Bahujan Samaj Party), 1394 votes (0.97%)
- 5. Mahender Sundana (Jannayak Janta Party), 1191 votes (0.83%)
- 6. Naresh Bagri (Aam Aadmi Party), 1062 votes (0.74%)
- 7. NOTA (None of the Above), 429 votes (0.3%)
- 8. Deepak Singh (Independent), 333 votes (0.23%)
- 9. Manjeet (Haryana Jan Sevak Party), 237 votes (0.17%)
- 10. Sneh Arya (Independent), 225 votes (0.16%)
- 11. Baba Ishwar Nath (Aam Aadmi Parivartan Party), 221 votes (0.15%)
- 12. Om Parkash (Peoples Party of India (Democratic)), 119 votes (0.08%)
- 13. Vinod (Independent), 115 votes (0.08%)
- 14. Ranbir (Nationalist Congress Party), 56 votes (0.04%)
Past election results in Kalanaur
In the 2019 Haryana Assembly elections, Shakuntla Khatak of INC won in this seat defeating Ramavtar Balmiki of BJP by a margin of 10,624 which was 07.95% of the total votes cast for the seat. INC had a vote share of 46.53% in 2019 in this seat.
In the 2014 Haryana Assembly elections, Shakuntla Khatak of INC won in this seat defeating Ram Avtar Balmiki of BJP by a margin of 3,972 which was 3.12% of the total votes cast for the seat. INC had a vote share of 39.63% in 2014 in this seat.
In the 2009 Haryana Assembly elections, Shakuntla of INC won in this seat defeating Naga Ram of INLD by a margin of 27,860 which was 30.31% of the total votes cast for the seat. INC had a vote share of 56.72% in 2009 in this seat.
Kalanaur Assembly seat – Lok Sabha results
Kalanaur Assembly constituency is part of 7. Rohtak (General) Lok Sabha constituency. In the 2024 Lok Sabha elections, INC was the leading party in this assembly segment. The Rohtak Lok Sabha seat was won by Deepender Singh Hooda of INC defeating Dr. Arvind Kumar Sharma of BJP.
In the 2019 Lok Saba polls, BJP led in this assembly segment. The Rohtak Lok Sabha seat was won by Arvind Kumar Sharma of BJP beating Deepender Singh Hooda of INC.
In 2014, BJP was ahead in this particular assembly segment and the Rohtak Lok Sabha constituency was won by Deepender Singh Hooda of INC defeating Om Parkash Dhankar of BJP.
In the 2009 Parliamentary elections, INC was the leading party in the Kalanaur assembly segment while the Rohtak Lok Sabha constituency was won by Deepender Singh of INC defeating Nafe Singh Rathee of INLD.
Voter turnout in Kalanaur
According to data released by the Election Commission of India, in the 2024 Haryana Assembly elections, the voter turnout in Kalanaur constituency was 65.86%. In 2019, this seat registered a turnout of 67.63%, while it was 71.86% in 2014 and 62.14% in 2009. The estimated turnout in 2024 was +1.77% compared to the 2019 turnout.
List of contesting candidates and candidate profiles
13 candidates were in the fray for the Kalanaur Assembly seat in the 2024 Haryana Assembly election.
Brief profiles of candidates contesting from Kalanaur in the 2024 elections sourced from the affidavits submitted by the candidates with the Election Commission of India and as analysed by the Association of Democratic Reforms (ADR):
- Baba Ishwar Nath, Aam Aadmi Parivartan Party (AAPVP); Gender: Male; Age: 54 years; Profession: Astrologer, Social Servant; Education: 10th Pass; Total assets: Rs 2.2 lakh; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
- Deepak Singh, Independent (IND); Gender: Male; Age: 37 years; Profession: Data Entry Operator; Education: 12th Pass; Total assets: Rs 3.8 lakh; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
- Mahender Sundana, Jannayak Janta Party (JJP); Gender: Male; Age: 50 years; Profession: Business; Education: Graduate; Total assets: Rs 22.4 lakh; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
- Manjeet, Haryana Jan Sevak Party (HJSP); Gender: Male; Age: 40 years; Profession: Private Job as Manager; Education: Post Graduate; Total assets: Rs 84.1 lakh; No. of declared criminal cases: 4.
- Naresh Bagri, Aam Aadmi Party (AAP); Gender: Male; Age: 45 years; Profession: Dairy Farming; Education: 10th Pass; Total assets: Rs 58.3 lakh; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
- Om Parkash, Peoples Party of India (Democratic) (PPID); Gender: Male; Age: 43 years; Profession: Ex. Service Man Indian Army; Education: 12th Pass; Total assets: Rs 66.4 lakh; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
- Poonam Nigana, Bahujan Samaj Party (BSP); Gender: Female; Age: 36 years; Profession: House Wife; Education: Post Graduate; Total assets: Rs 36.6 lakh; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
- Prem Pradhan, Independent (IND); Gender: Male; Age: 64 years; Profession: Social Worker; Education: Graduate; Total assets: Rs 60.7 lakh; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
- Ranbir, Nationalist Congress Party (NCP); Gender: Male; Age: 53 years; Profession: E-Rickshaw; Education: 8th Pass; Total assets: Rs 1.1 lakh; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
- Renu Dabla, Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP); Gender: Female; Age: 36 years; Profession: Advocate and Social Worker; Education: Post Graduate; Total assets: Rs 1.7 crore; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
- Shakuntla Khatak, Indian National Congress (INC); Gender: Female; Age: 56 years; Profession: Politician; Education: Graduate; Total assets: Rs 8.5 crore; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
- Sneh Arya, Independent (IND); Gender: Female; Age: 32 years; Profession: Teacher (Private); Education: 12th Pass; Total assets: Rs 7.1 lakh; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
- Vinod, Independent (IND); Gender: Male; Age: 51 years; Profession: Business; Education: 10th Pass; Total assets: Rs 3.5 lakh; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
